sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 164 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1,4,25,27 & 30 2. For orders on CMA No.1471/2024 3. For orders on CMA No.1472/2024 4. For hearing of main case 03.02.2026 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the applicant Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for respondent Per learned counsel for the applicant, matter before the court is covered against the applicant by virtue of judgment of honourable Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Lahore vs. Millat Tractors reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view hereof, learned counsel states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
